name: contextshield
description: Scrub sensitive data and improve prompt clarity before sending to any AI tool. Fully local, no cloud, no data leaves your machine.

contextshield.audit.logToOutputChannel.title: Log to Output
contextshield.audit.logToOutputChannel.description: Write ContextShield events to the VS Code Output Channel.

contextshield.scrubbing.pii.title: Scrub PII
contextshield.scrubbing.pii.description: Detect and redact PII (email, phone, IP, UUID) before prompt enhancement.

contextshield.scrubbing.secrets.title: Scrub Secrets
contextshield.scrubbing.secrets.description: Detect and redact secrets (API keys, JWTs, tokens) before prompt enhancement.

contextshield.scrubbing.entropyThreshold.title: Entropy Threshold
contextshield.scrubbing.entropyThreshold.description: Shannon entropy threshold (bits per symbol) for flagging high-entropy tokens as secrets. Range 1–8; default 4.5.

contextshield.scrubbing.customPatterns.title: Custom Patterns
contextshield.scrubbing.customPatterns.description: Additional regex patterns for secret detection. One pattern per line.

contextshield.llm.enabled.title: Enabled
contextshield.llm.enabled.description: After scrubbing, rewrite the prompt with a local on-device model. Use the ContextShield sidebar to download the model.

contextshield.llm.model.title: Model
contextshield.llm.model.description: Hugging Face model id for local ONNX inference. Compatibility depends on the current Transformers.js/ONNX runtime.

contextshield.llm.systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
contextshield.llm.systemPrompt.description: Override default system prompt for enhancement. Empty uses built-in default.

contextshield.llm.maxNewTokens.title: Max New Tokens
contextshield.llm.maxNewTokens.description: Maximum new tokens for the enhanced prompt output.
